title: Somebody That I Used to Know
why_this_song: Somebody That I Used to Know by Gotye (2011) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Somebody (now you're just somebody that I used to know)
Somebody (now you're just somebody that I used to know)
Told myself that you were right for me
But felt so lonely in your company
But that was love, and it's an ache I still remember

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "somebody" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "somebody" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "used" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "used" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: "Somebody That I Used to Know" was released in 2011. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Somebody That I Used to Know" foi lançada em 2011. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Somebody That I Used to Know" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Somebody That I Used to Know" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
